GaushalaDatabase.title: Gaushala Database
GaushalaDatabase.description: The complete payroll, attendance, and settings database for Shri Krishna Balram Gaushala.

employees.description: List of active and inactive staff members.

attendance.description: Multi-punch attendance records indexed by employee ID and date.

payments.description: Financial ledger transactions including advance and salary payments.

overtimeEntries.description: Overtime logs including modifiers and multipliers.

company.description: Gaushala meta details like name, logo, and custom base settings.

gaushala_configs/main.description: Global state document synchronized in real-time across all authorized devices.
